name: manual_70598f
claim: Service methods (e.g. getProductById) that are called from both page components AND generateMetadata must return null on all error paths — never throw. Throwing from a service causes the entire Server Component tree to fail with misleading errors.

decisions.notes: ProductService.getProductById threw on non-404 Supabase errors. This caused generateMetadata (which called it) to crash the page render with a fake ClerkAPIResponseError. Consistent return-null pattern prevents this category of bug.

rationale: ProductService.getProductById threw on non-404 Supabase errors. This caused generateMetadata (which called it) to crash the page render with a fake ClerkAPIResponseError. Consistent return-null pattern prevents this category of bug.
